title: Coplan sauve sa peau
writer: Claude Veillot, Yves Boisset, Paul Kenny
actors: Claudio Brook, Margaret Lee, Klaus Kinski
plot: In Istanbul, a young woman is attacked by six thugs and the agent Frank Milland who had set a rendez-vous with her, is outnumbered, and she dies. Frank is menaced later in order to stop his inquiry about the thugs identities. Each...
